zh.Warwick, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾沃里克
zh.Fillongley, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾費隆格利
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Hastings於大約1164年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾費隆格利時，他的父親Ralph de Hastings49歲，母親Lescelina de Trailly21歲。他和Elizabeth Capet至少有4個兒子。他去世於1210年7月25日享年47歲。

zh-hans.Warwick, Warwickshire, England: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾沃里克
zh-hans.Fillongley, Warwickshire, England: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾費隆格利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Hastings于大约1164年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾費隆格利时，他的父亲Ralph de Hastings49岁，母亲Lescelina de Trailly21岁。他和Elizabeth Capet至少有4个儿子。他去世于1210年7月25日享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Hastings was born about 1164, in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph de Hastings, was 49 and his mother, Lescelina de Trailly, was 21. He had at least 4 sons with Elizabeth Capet. He died on 25 July 1210, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Hastings est né environ 1164, à Fillongley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Hastings, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Lescelina de Trailly, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Elizabeth Capet. Il est décédé le 25 juillet 1210, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Hastings um 1164 in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Hastings 49 und seine Mutter Lescelina de Trailly 21. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Capet mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 25. Juli 1210 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Hastings è nato il circa 1164 nel Fillongley, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph de Hastings, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Lescelina de Trailly, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Elizabeth Capet. Morì il 25 luglio 1210, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Hastingsが約1164年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアフィロングリーで生まれた時，父Ralph de Hastingsは49歳，母Lescelina de Traillyは21歳であった。彼はElizabeth Capetとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1210年7月25日に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Hastings(이)가 대략 1164년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 피론글리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Hastings(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Lescelina de Trailly(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Capet(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1210년 7월 25일 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Fillongley, Warwickshire, England: Fillongley, Wæringscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Hastings nasceu aproximadamente 1164, em Fillongley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph de Hastings, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Lescelina de Trailly, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Elizabeth Capet. Ele faleceu em 25 de julho de 1210, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Hastings родился около 1164 г. в местности филлонгли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph de Hastings было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Lescelina de Trailly, 21. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Elizabeth Capet. Он умер 25 июля 1210 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Hastings nació aproximadamente 1164, en Fillongley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph de Hastings, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Lescelina de Trailly, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Elizabeth Capet. Murió el 25 de julio de 1210, a la edad de 47 años.
